refined_caption: The hospital bathroom appears to be unhygienic with visible dirt and a trash can. The toilet is also present in the dirty environment.
complaint_description: I was shocked to see the state of the hospital bathroom, it was dirty and had a strong unpleasant odor. The trash can was not emptied and the toilet was not clean. This is unacceptable for a hospital where patients are supposed to recover.
voice_text: The hospital bathroom is really dirty and disgusting, there's trash everywhere and the toilet is not clean.
